description: Upgrade up-cli to v1.0.0 with state unification, smart merge, and AST analysis

userStories.title: Isolate Verification Environment (Phase 6.2)
userStories.description: Modify verification.py to invoke pytest and ruff using the current Python executable to prevent environment leaks.
acceptanceCriteria: subprocess.run in run_verification_with_results uses [sys.executable, '-m', 'pytest'] instead of just ['pytest']
subprocess.run uses [sys.executable, '-m', 'ruff'] instead of just ['ruff']
Tests still pass and verify correctly

userStories.title: Unify Worktree State (Phase 6.1)
userStories.description: Deprecate .agent_state.json in individual worktrees. WorktreeState should read and write directly to the main .up/state.json using StateManager.
acceptanceCriteria: WorktreeState.load and WorktreeState.save use get_state_manager().state.agents dictionary
Individual .agent_state.json files are no longer created in .worktrees/*
Parallel execution manager can still track active worktrees accurately

userStories.title: Abstract AIEngine Interface (Phase 7.1)
userStories.description: Create an AIEngine interface to decouple AI calls from CLI specifics. Move current subprocess logic into CliEngine.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/ai/engine.py with an abstract base class AIEngine
Implement CliEngine(AIEngine) that wraps the existing claude/agent subprocess calls
Refactor src/up/ai_cli.py to use the new Engine classes
Tests still pass

userStories.title: AI-Driven Merge Conflict Resolution (Phase 7.3)
userStories.description: Enhance parallel worktree merging to automatically resolve Git conflicts using the AIEngine.
acceptanceCriteria: If merge_worktree encounters a Git conflict, it extracts the files with conflict markers (<<<<<<< HEAD)
Sends the conflicted file content to AIEngine to resolve the conflict intelligently
Applies the resolved code, runs `git add`, and finalizes the merge
Fails only if AI cannot resolve it

userStories.title: AST-Based Code Analysis (Phase 8.1)
userStories.description: Upgrade ProjectAnalyzer to use Python's `ast` module instead of Regex for more accurate detection of patterns and frameworks.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor `_detect_patterns` in src/up/learn/analyzer.py to use `ast.parse` for Python files
Accurately detects classes, functions, and decorators (e.g. @dataclass, Repository, Service)
Regex fallback is only used for non-Python files

userStories.title: E2E Loop Validation Tests (Phase 8.2)
userStories.description: Add End-to-End tests simulating the full SESRC loop using a mocked AIEngine.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/test_e2e_loop.py
Test successful loop: Observe -> Checkpoint -> Mock AI writes code -> Verify passes -> Commit
Test failure loop: Mock AI writes syntax error -> Verify fails -> Rollback -> Doom loop triggered
